questions.question: 1 (a) A list of compounds is shown. aluminium oxide calcium bromide calcium oxide ethane ethene hydrogen chloride methane nitrogen dioxide potassium iodide potassium manganate( VII) sodium chloride Answer the following questions using only the compounds in the list. Each compound may be used once, more than once or not at all. Which compound: (i) when in acidified solution, is us
